auth.title: Welcome back

status.notFoundText: This short code is unknown or was entered incorrectly.
status.pausedText: This smart card is currently paused.
status.lostText: The owner has marked this smart card as lost.
status.disabledText: This smart card is no longer active.
status.fallbackText: This card does not have an active destination. Ask its owner to configure it.
status.unavailableText: This public profile is currently unavailable.

plans.limitReached: You reached the limit for this plan.

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.emailInUse: This email address is already in use.

sms.title: SMS status
sms.description: Provider status and delivery results only, without credentials, tokens or OTP values.
sms.testWarning: Test environment: Environment 2 is not live.
sms.malformed: The test phone list or fixed code is invalid; testing mode is disabled.
sms.formDescription: Enter an Egyptian number. The code is generated on the server and never shown here or in logs.
sms.bypassed: The allowlisted testing path ran without contacting SMS Misr or exposing the code.
sms.sent: The test message was sent and recorded without exposing the code.
sms.rateLimited: The delivery limit for this number was reached. Try later.
sms.failed: The test message could not be sent. Check provider status.

settings.description: Upload policies are enforced server-side and configured with environment variables.
